---
title: "Writing a short science paper (for those with short attention spans)"
image: "guidebook_images/notebook.jpg"
description: "Have a short attention span for writing and reading? Here's a sentence-by-sentence paper recipe!"
categories: ["writing"]
href: "guidebooks/short-paper-writing.html"
order: 1
format:
  html:
    toc: TRUE
---

This is test!
